description: Defines how control_mode presets adjust authority enforcement behavior

autonomous.description: Full agent autonomy — authority enforcement disabled, agents decide freely

guarded.description: Default — authority boundaries active, domain filtering on, human approval for out-of-scope

advisory.description: Read-only mode — agents suggest but don't execute, all findings shown unfiltered

surgical.description: Maximum restriction — agents only touch listed files, all changes require confirmation

flag_descriptions.authority_enforcement: When true, authority-enforcer validates domain ownership before agent actions
flag_descriptions.domain_filtering: When true, out-of-domain findings are filtered during review synthesis
flag_descriptions.human_approval_required: When true, agents must escalate out-of-scope decisions per authority matrix
flag_descriptions.file_scope_restriction: When true, agents can only modify files explicitly listed in plan files_modified
flag_descriptions.read_only: When true, agents suggest changes but do not execute them; auto-commit is suppressed

when_to_use.autonomous: Trusted workflows, solo development, rapid prototyping where speed matters more than guardrails
when_to_use.guarded: Default for team workflows — balances agent productivity with human oversight
when_to_use.advisory: Code review, architecture exploration, learning a codebase — no changes, only suggestions
when_to_use.surgical: Production hotfixes, sensitive codebases, compliance-critical changes — maximum safety
